req_500.jd_summary: Senior Backend Engineer, distributed systems team. Owns services handling payment-critical traffic.
must_have: Strong distributed systems fundamentals (demonstrated in systems design round)
Track record of clear, calm communication under ambiguity or pressure
nice_to_have: Prior experience owning a service end-to-end
prioritized_signals: Systems design round carries the most weight -- this is a hands-on IC role
Any red flag on team collaboration should be weighed heavily given past team friction on this org
Cross-functional round is supplementary, not decisive
